task_completion.description: The input image is opened in an image editing application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image editor (such as GIMP) is open and displaying a photograph.

task_completion.description: Transparent regions are created in the image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Parts of the image have been erased or deleted, revealing a checkerboard pattern which indicates transparency.

task_completion.description: The save or export dialog is configured with the correct file name and path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog is visible with the file name set to 'output.png' and the destination folder set to '/home/ga/Documents'.

task_completion.description: The modified image is saved to the target location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The export dialog is closed and the image editor's title bar updates to 'output.png', or a file manager shows 'output.png' in the Documents directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical image editor to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with GUI tools (like an eraser or selection tool) in an image editor, rather than using terminal commands like ImageMagick.

integrity.description: The agent edited the actual input image rather than creating a new transparent file from scratch.
integrity.visual_evidence: The transparent regions are surrounded by the original photograph, proving the original image was modified.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script or terminal command to bypass manual editing.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal window is shown executing Python scripts or ImageMagick commands to process the image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input image is a real Unsplash photo (JPEG, RGB). The output must be saved as a PNG to preserve transparency. The verifier checks that the output has an alpha channel (RGBA or LA mode), at least 8% of the image is transparent, and at least 5% of pixels show significant alpha change (meaningful erasure). The screen resolution is 1920x1080.
